sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْسِ السَّنَةِ، يَتَبَادَلُ النَّاسُ التَّهَانِيَ.
sentences.translation: Na Novu godinu, ljudi razmjenjuju čestitke.
sentences.translationEn: On New Year's, people exchange congratulations.
They say «May you be well every year».
They visit friends and bring gifts.

sentences.arabic: الاحْتِفَالُ بِالسَّنَةِ الجَدِيدَةِ يَخْتَلِفُ مِنْ بَلَدٍ إِلَى بَلَدٍ.
sentences.translation: Proslava Nove godine se razlikuje od zemlje do zemlje.
sentences.translationEn: The New Year celebration differs from country to country.

sentences.arabic: الأَهَمُّ هُوَ أَنْ نَكُونَ مَعَ مَنْ نُحِبُّ.
sentences.translation: Najvažnije je biti s onima koje volimo.
sentences.translationEn: The most important thing is to be with those we love.
